mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, password, name, gender, email, address, role, account_status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE name = #{name} AND email = #{email}
SELECT id, login_id, password, name, gender, email, address, role, account_status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (login_id, password, name, gender, email, address, role, account_status) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{email}, #{address}, #{role}, #{accountStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, password, name, gender, email, address, role, account_status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, login_id, password, name, gender, email, address, role, account_status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND name = #{name} AND email = #{email}
mapper.update:
UPDATE user
updated_at = NOW(),
password = #{password},
email = #{email},
address = #{address},
gender = #{gender}
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, login_id, name, gender, email, address, role, account_status, created_at, updated_at FROM user WHERE role != 'ADMIN' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM user WHERE role != 'ADMIN'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO token (user_id, token, created_at, expired_at, requested_ip) VALUES (#{userId}, #{token}, #{createdAt}, #{expiredAt}, #{requestedIp})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, token, created_at, expired_at, used_yn, requested_ip, used_ip FROM token WHERE token = #{token} AND used_yn = 'N' AND expired_at > NOW()
